memberdef.name: read_sysreg32
memberdef.initializer: ({ \ uint32_t val; \ __asm__ volatile ("mrc p15, " #op1 ", %0, c" #CRn ", c" \ #CRm ", " #op2 : "=r" (val) :: "memory"); \ val; \ })

memberdef.name: read_sysreg64
memberdef.initializer: ({ \ uint64_t val; \ __asm__ volatile ("mrrc p15, " #op1 ", %Q0, %R0, c" \ #CRm : "=r" (val) :: "memory"); \ val; \ })

memberdef.name: MAKE_REG_HELPER
memberdef.initializer: static ALWAYS_INLINE uint32_t read_##reg(void) \ { \ return read_sysreg32(op1, CRn, CRm, op2); \ } \ static ALWAYS_INLINE void write_##reg(uint32_t val) \ { \ write_sysreg32(val, op1, CRn, CRm, op2); \ }

memberdef.name: MAKE_REG64_HELPER
memberdef.initializer: static ALWAYS_INLINE uint64_t read_##reg(void) \ { \ return read_sysreg64(op1, CRm); \ } \ static ALWAYS_INLINE void write_##reg(uint64_t val) \ { \ write_sysreg64(val, op1, CRm); \ }
